name: Kedar Nanda
title: Senior AI & Data Engineer
base_skills: Data Engineering & Platforms: ETL/ELT pipelines, data modeling, dimensional design (star/snowflake), data warehousing, data lakes, data marts, batch and real-time processing, distributed systems, pipeline optimization, fault tolerance, partitioning, performance tuning.

Cloud & Big Data: AWS (S3, Redshift, Lambda, Glue, EMR, Kinesis, SQS, SNS, CloudWatch), Snowflake, Azure (ADF, Databricks, Synapse), GCP (BigQuery, Cloud Storage), Apache Spark (Core, SQL, Streaming), PySpark, Hadoop (HDFS), Hive, Kafka, Sqoop, Cloudera CDP, Athena.
Streaming & Orchestration: Kafka, AWS Kinesis, Spark Streaming, event-driven architectures, Apache Airflow, Apache NiFi, AWS Glue, Azure Data Factory, Autosys, Control-M, Alteryx.

Programming & Databases: Python, SQL, PySpark, Scala, Java, Shell scripting, Oracle PL/SQL, UNIX; Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Snowflake; NoSQL (MongoDB, Cassandra, DynamoDB, Redis); schema design, indexing, query optimization.

Analytics, AI & Applications: Tableau, QuickSight, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly; Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Random Forest, XGBoost, KNN, PCA, K-Means, Neural Networks; GPT-4/3.5, Claude, Gemini, Hugging Face, LangChain, RAG, Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, PromptLayer; FastAPI, Flask, Streamlit, React.

DevOps, Governance & Leadership: Jenkins, GitLab CI, CircleCI, Azure DevOps, AWS CodePipeline, Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, Terraform; data quality, lineage, monitoring, governance, IAM, encryption, HIPAA compliance; Agile, team leadership, mentoring, stakeholder management.

education.school: Biju Patnaik University of Technology, Odisha
